## Summary

Describe what changed and why this is safe for public visibility.

## Disclosure Safety Checklist (Required)

- [ ] I confirm no customer-identifying information is included.
- [ ] I confirm no private endpoint, internal URL, or infrastructure ID is included.
- [ ] I confirm no secrets, keys, or tokens are included.
- [ ] I confirm no proprietary architecture internals are disclosed.
- [ ] I confirm this change was reviewed by a technical owner.
- [ ] I confirm this change was reviewed by a product/security owner.

## Validation

- [ ] Boundary policy checks passed.
- [ ] Security gates passed.
